name: Plugin Network
description: Living map of OpenClaw plugin usage and cross-talk, served on a localhost port for SSH tunneling.

windowDays.description: Number of days of session history to aggregate. Default 30.

sessionsDir.description: Directory scanned recursively for *.trajectory.jsonl session logs. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/agents.

includeGroups.description: Bare (non-connector) tool groups to keep as nodes. Connectors with dotted tool names (e.g. codex_apps.*) are always kept. Default: bash, cron, message, memory.

port.description: Local TCP port for the viewer HTTP server. Default 8742.

bindHost.description: Bind address. Default 0.0.0.0 for Docker (reachable across the container boundary; keep it private by publishing the Docker port as -p 127.0.0.1:PORT:PORT). On bare-metal, use 127.0.0.1.

idleShutdownMinutes.description: Stop the viewer server after this many minutes of inactivity. Default 30.
